summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Orderly SaaS web app - both backend APIs and frontend UI are working perfectly. All authentication, CRUD operations, navigation, and responsive design features tested successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login/logout with httpOnly cookies
Backend: Dashboard API with correct stats (5 customers, 6 orders, $8250 revenue, 3 reminders today)
Backend: Customers CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend: Orders CRUD operations with status management
Backend: Reminders CRUD operations with due today filtering
Backend: Proper authentication protection (401 after logout)
Frontend: Login page loads with professional design
Frontend: Admin login flow with admin@orderly.com/admin123
Frontend: Dashboard displays stats cards and recent data
Frontend: Navigation between Dashboard, Customers, Orders, Reminders pages
Frontend: Status badges show correct colors (New=gray, Paid=green, Shipped=blue)
Frontend: User dropdown menu with logout functionality
Frontend: Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu
Frontend: Deep blue professional SaaS theme (#0A2540)
Frontend: Shadcn UI components properly integrated
